X2Twitter - The Best Twitter Downloader

What is a Twitter Downloader? A Twitter Downloader is a tool that helps to download videos from Twitter online. It allows you to download videos from Twitter to your phone, computer without needing to install any software. Supports all devices like PC, Android, iPhone, iPad.

X2Twitter.com is an online Twitter downloader, allowing you to download high-quality Full HD, 1080p, 2k, 4k Twitter videos. Just paste the Twitter video link into the input box on X2Twitter and press the Download button to easily save any Twitter video to your device.

X2Twitter can also convert Twitter videos to mp3, download Twitter mp3 music with the best quality. All you need is a link to the Twitter video, and the processing is handled on our server.

How to download video on Twitter (X)

  • Step 1: Open the Twitter (X) app on your phone or visit Twitter.com using a browser.
  • Step 2: Navigate to the video you want to download, press the Share () icon below the video and then select Copy Link.
  • Step 3: Go to X2Twitter.com website, paste the copied link into the input box and press the Download button.
  • Step 4: Press the Download MP4 or Download MP3 button to save the video/audio to your device.

💡💡 Tip: Add "x2" before "twitter.com" for fastest Twitter video download.

Features of the Twitter Downloader

  • Easy to use, helps download Twitter videos in a few simple steps.
  • Download high-quality Twitter videos: Full HD, 1080p, 2k, 4k.
  • Supports quick conversion and download of audio in .mp3 format.
  • Supports all platforms and devices such as: PC, iPhone, Android, Windows, Linux, MacOS.
  • X2Twitter.com works on web browsers, no software installation required.
  • Completely free. No feature limitations and no download limits.
  • Does not collect user data and also does not store download history.

Why should you use X2Twitter - Twitter Downloader?

The Twitter Downloader is a tool developed to help users quickly download videos from Twitter without any issues. It supports saving and downloading Twitter videos to your phone or computer in the best quality.

X2Twitter Downloader is a tool developed and operated by a team with extensive experience in the video downloading field. It has a user-friendly interface that allows you to save Twitter videos to your device without needing to read any instruction manuals.

With X2Twitter.com, you can easily download your favorite videos from Twitter to your device. We will continually upgrade to give you the best experience! Please share this tool with your friends and family. Thank you!

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Twitter Video Downloader?

Twitter Video Downloader is a tool to help you download Twitter videos easily. Support download MP4, GIF, convert Twitter videos to MP3 for free. Twitter videos can be downloaded on Android or iPhone, iPad.

How to download Twitter videos?

  • Step 1: Open the Twitter app, find and copy the link of the video you want to download.
  • Step 2: Open the website X2Twitter.com, paste the copied link into the input box and press the Download button.
  • (X2Twitter.com works well on Chrome, Firefox or any other browser.)

Does X2Twitter support downloading audio (mp3) on Twitter?

Yes, our Twitter downloader allows you to quickly convert Twitter videos to mp3. This is a standout feature only available on X2Twitter.

How to download Twitter videos on Android phone?

Very simple. Just copy the Twitter video link → Open the X2Twitter.com website → Paste the copied link into the input box → Press the Download button.

How to download Twitter videos on iPhone?

For iPhone, you need to use the Safari browser on iOS 13 or download the Documents by Readdle app and go to X2Twitter.com → Paste the Twitter video link → Press the Download button (see guide here).

Do I have to pay to use X2Twitter?

No. The X2Twitter downloader is a completely free tool, allowing you to quickly download videos on Twitter without any feature limitations or download restrictions.

Where do Twitter videos save after downloading?

Every browser has a "Download" folder where downloaded files are stored. Downloaded Twitter videos are also located in this folder. If you can't find it, check your browser's "Download History".

Which languages does X2Twitter support?

Currently, X2Twitter.com supports 30 languages and will continually update with new language packs to provide the best experience for users.

Note: X2Twitter.com is not officially affiliated with Twitter. It does not host or use any pirated or copyrighted content on its servers and all uploaded videos are stored directly from their CDN servers on the respective users' machines. response.
